word: H338 - אִי - ʼîy - ee - Wild beast of the islands

sections.paragraph:
Original: אי

Transliteration: 'ı̂y

Phonetic: ee

BDB Definition:

  1. howling beast, jackal

Origin: probably identical with H337 (through the idea of a doleful sound)

TWOT entry: 43a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
